query_nl: Detect a ransomware that encrypts files using CryptEncrypt API
yara_rule:
rule Detect_WannaCry_CryptEncrypt : ransomware encryption
{
    meta:
        description = "Detects WannaCry ransomware via CryptEncrypt API and .WNCRY extension"
        author      = "Student Dataset"
        date        = "2026-01-10"
        severity    = "critical"
        reference   = "https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1486/"

    strings:
        // Windows crypto API used for file encryption
        $api1 = "CryptEncrypt"
        $api2 = "CryptAcquireContext" nocase

        // WannaCry specific file extension
        $ext  = ".WNCRY" fullword

        // Ransom note filename
        $note = "@Please_Read_Me@.txt" fullword

        // WannaCry string marker
        $mark = "WannaCry" nocase

    condition:
        pe.is_pe and
        filesize < 10MB and
        $api1 and
        ($ext or $note or $mark)
}
label: malicious
